EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IServerLogQuery

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Server
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Server.dll

Provides access to members that configure a query to the ArcGIS Server logs.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("97D02AC6-AABB-4030-85F1-7280F28785DE")]
public interface IServerLogQuery

Properties

EndTime

The end time in the ArcGIS Server logs at which to end the query.

DateTime EndTime { get; set; }

Property Value

DateTime

Examples

Sample Snippet

Level

The log level at which to query (1-5).

int Level { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Machine

The machine name for which to query.

string Machine { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaxRecords

The maximum number of records to retrieve with the query.

int MaxRecords { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

StartIndex

The starting index at which to start retrieving records from the query.

int StartIndex { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

StartTime

The start time in the ArcGIS Server logs at which to begin the query.

DateTime StartTime { get; set; }

Property Value

DateTime

Examples

Sample Snippet

Target

The log target name.

string Target { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet
